=== design_spec.md ===
# OnlineLibrary Design Specification

---

## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend Development)

### General Notes
- The root route `/` redirects to the dashboard page `/dashboard`.
- Each route corresponds to a key user action: browsing, borrowing, returning, reviewing, reservation management.
- HTTP methods use GET for page display and POST for state-changing operations.

| URL Path                            | Function Name          | HTTP Method(s) | Template Rendered           | Context Variables Passed to Template                                                  |
|-----------------------------------|------------------------|----------------|-----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------|
| `/`                               | `root_redirect`        | GET            | Redirect to `/dashboard`    | None                                                                                  |
| `/dashboard`                     | `dashboard_page`       | GET            | `dashboard.html`             | `username` (str), `featured_books` (List[Dict{book_id: int, title: str}])             |
| `/catalog`                       | `catalog_page`         | GET            | `catalog.html`               | `books` (List[Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str, status: str}])              |
| `/book/<int:book_id>`            | `book_details`         | GET            | `book_details.html`          | `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str, status: str, description: str, avg_rating: float}), `reviews` (List[Dict{review_id: int, username: str, rating: int, review_text: str, review_date: str}]) |
| `/borrow/<int:book_id>`          | `borrow_confirmation`  | GET, POST      | `borrow_confirmation.html`   | `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str}), `due_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)      |
| `/borrow/<int:book_id>/confirm`  | `confirm_borrow`       | POST           | `borrow_result.html`         | `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    |
| `/my_borrows`                   | `my_borrowings`        | GET            | `my_borrows.html`            | `username` (str), `borrows` (List[Dict{borrow_id: int, book_title: str, borrow_date: str, due_date: str, status: str}]) |
| `/return_borrow/<int:borrow_id>` | `return_borrow`        | POST           | `return_result.html`         | `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    |
| `/my_reservations`              | `my_reservations`      | GET            | `my_reservations.html`       | `username` (str), `reservations` (List[Dict{reservation_id: int, book_title: str, reservation_date: str, status: str}]) |
| `/cancel_reservation/<int:reservation_id>` | `cancel_reservation` | POST     | `cancel_reservation_result.html`| `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    |
| `/my_reviews`                  | `my_reviews`           | GET            | `my_reviews.html`            | `username` (str), `reviews` (List[Dict{review_id: int, book_title: str, rating: int, review_text: str, review_date: str}]) |
| `/write_review/<int:book_id>`   | `write_review`         | GET, POST      | `write_review.html`          | `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str}), `existing_review` (Dict or None with fields review_id:int, rating:int, review_text:str) |
| `/submit_review/<int:book_id>`  | `submit_review`        | POST           | `review_submit_result.html`  | `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    |
| `/profile`                    | `user_profile`         | GET            | `profile.html`               | `username` (str), `email` (str), `phone` (str), `address` (str), `borrow_history` (List[Dict{book_title: str, borrow_date: str, return_date: str or None}]) |
| `/update_profile`              | `update_profile`       | POST           | `profile_update_result.html` | `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    |
| `/payment/<int:fine_id>`       | `payment_confirmation` | GET            | `payment_confirmation.html`  | `fine_amount` (float), `fine_id` (int)                                               |
| `/confirm_payment/<int:fine_id>`| `confirm_payment`      | POST           | `payment_result.html`        | `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    |

---

## Section 2: HTML Template Specifications (Frontend Development)

### 1. dashboard.html (templates/dashboard.html)
- **Page Title (in <title> and <h1>):** "Library Dashboard"
- **Elements:**
  - `dashboard-page` (div)
  - `welcome-message` (h1) - displays username welcome message
  - `browse-books-button` (button) - navigates to Book Catalog
  - `my-borrows-button` (button) - navigates to My Borrowings
- **Context Variables:**
  - `username` (str)
  - `featured_books` (List[Dict{book_id: int, title: str}])
- **Navigation Mappings:**
  - `browse-books-button`: `url_for('catalog_page')`
  - `my-borrows-button`: `url_for('my_borrowings')`

### 2. catalog.html (templates/catalog.html)
- **Page Title:** "Book Catalog"
- **Elements:**
  - `catalog-page` (div)
  - `search-input` (input) - search by title or author
  - `book-grid` (div) - grid container for book cards
  - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (button) - dynamic id for each book; navigates to Book Details
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - navigates back to Dashboard
- **Context Variables:**
  - `books` (List[Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str, status: str}])
- **Navigation Mappings:**
  - `view-book-button-{book_id}`: `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`
  - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard_page')`

### 3. book_details.html (templates/book_details.html)
- **Page Title:** "Book Details"
- **Elements:**
  - `book-details-page` (div)
  - `book-title` (h1)
  - `book-author` (div)
  - `book-status` (div) - shows availability: Available, Borrowed, Reserved
  - `borrow-button` (button)
  - `reviews-section` (div) - list user reviews
  - `write-review-button` (button)
  - `back-to-catalog` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str, status: str, description: str, avg_rating: float})
  - `reviews` (List[Dict{review_id: int, username: str, rating: int, review_text: str, review_date: str}])
- **Navigation Mappings:**
  - `borrow-button`: `url_for('borrow_confirmation', book_id=book.book_id)`
  - `write-review-button`: `url_for('write_review', book_id=book.book_id)`
  - `back-to-catalog`: `url_for('catalog_page')`

### 4. borrow_confirmation.html (templates/borrow_confirmation.html)
- **Page Title:** "Borrow Confirmation"
- **Elements:**
  - `borrow-page` (div)
  - `borrow-book-info` (div)
  - `due-date-display` (div)
  - `confirm-borrow-button` (button, within a POST form)
  - `cancel-borrow-button` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str})
  - `due_date` (str, format YYYY-MM-DD)
- **Navigation Mappings:**
  - `confirm-borrow-button`: form action = `url_for('confirm_borrow', book_id=book.book_id)`, method="POST"
  - `cancel-borrow-button`: `url_for('book_details', book_id=book.book_id)`

### 5. my_borrows.html (templates/my_borrows.html)
- **Page Title:** "My Borrowings"
- **Elements:**
  - `my-borrows-page` (div)
  - `filter-status` (dropdown: All, Active, Returned, Overdue)
  - `borrows-table` (table)
  - `return-book-button-{borrow_id}` (button, dynamic id; each active borrow)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `username` (str)
  - `borrows` (List[Dict{borrow_id: int, book_title: str, borrow_date: str, due_date: str, status: str}])
- **Navigation Mappings:**
  - `return-book-button-{borrow_id}`: form POST action = `url_for('return_borrow', borrow_id=borrow_id)`
  - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard_page')`

### 6. my_reservations.html (templates/my_reservations.html)
- **Page Title:** "My Reservations"
- **Elements:**
  - `reservations-page` (div)
  - `reservations-table` (table)
  - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (button, dynamic id)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `username` (str)
  - `reservations` (List[Dict{reservation_id: int, book_title: str, reservation_date: str, status: str}])
- **Navigation Mappings:**
  - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}`: form POST action = `url_for('cancel_reservation', reservation_id=reservation_id)`
  - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard_page')`

### 7. my_reviews.html (templates/my_reviews.html)
- **Page Title:** "My Reviews"
- **Elements:**
  - `reviews-page` (div)
  - `reviews-list` (div)
  - `edit-review-button-{review_id}` (button, dynamic id)
  - `delete-review-button-{review_id}` (button, dynamic id)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `username` (str)
  - `reviews` (List[Dict{review_id: int, book_title: str, rating: int, review_text: str, review_date: str}])
- **Navigation Mappings:**
  - `edit-review-button-{review_id}`: `url_for('write_review', book_id=book_id)`  (book_id must be provided by backend with reviews data)
  - `delete-review-button-{review_id}`: form POST action = `url_for('delete_review', review_id=review_id)`
  - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard_page')`

### 8. write_review.html (templates/write_review.html)
- **Page Title:** "Write Review"
- **Elements:**
  - `write-review-page` (div)
  - `book-info-display` (div)
  - `rating-input` (dropdown with options 1-5)
  - `review-text` (textarea)
  - `submit-review-button` (button within POST form)
  - `back-to-book` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str})
  - `existing_review` (Dict or None with fields review_id, rating, review_text)
- **Navigation Mappings:**
  - `submit-review-button`: form POST action = `url_for('submit_review', book_id=book.book_id)`
  - `back-to-book`: `url_for('book_details', book_id=book.book_id)`

### 9. profile.html (templates/profile.html)
- **Page Title:** "My Profile"
- **Elements:**
  - `profile-page` (div)
  - `profile-username` (div)
  - `profile-email` (input, type="email")
  - `update-profile-button` (button within POST form)
  - `borrow-history` (div)
  - `back-to-dashboard` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `username` (str)
  - `email` (str)
  - `phone` (str)
  - `address` (str)
  - `borrow_history` (List[Dict{book_title: str, borrow_date: str, return_date: str or None}])
- **Navigation Mappings:**
  - `update-profile-button`: form POST action = `url_for('update_profile')`
  - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard_page')`

### 10. payment_confirmation.html (templates/payment_confirmation.html)
- **Page Title:** "Payment Confirmation"
- **Elements:**
  - `payment-page` (div)
  - `fine-amount-display` (div)
  - `confirm-payment-button` (button within POST form)
  - `back-to-profile` (button)
- **Context Variables:**
  - `fine_amount` (float)
  - `fine_id` (int)
- **Navigation Mappings:**
  - `confirm-payment-button`: form POST action = `url_for('confirm_payment', fine_id=fine_id)`
  - `back-to-profile`: `url_for('user_profile')`

---

## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend Development)

All files located inside the `data` directory.
Files are pipe (`|`) delimited without headers.

### 1. users.txt
- Path: `data/users.txt`
- Fields: `username|email|phone|address`
- Description: Stores user profile information.
- Example rows:
  - `john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St`
  - `jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St`

### 2. books.txt
- Path: `data/books.txt`
- Fields: `book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating`
- Description: Stores details of all books.
- Example rows:
  - `1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8`
  - `2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6`
  - `3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7`

### 3. borrowings.txt
- Path: `data/borrowings.txt`
- Fields: `borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount`
- Description: User borrow transaction records.
- Example rows:
  - `1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0`
  - `2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0`
  - `3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00`

### 4. reservations.txt
- Path: `data/reservations.txt`
- Fields: `reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status`
- Description: Records for user reservations.
- Example rows:
  - `1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active`
  - `2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled`

### 5. reviews.txt
- Path: `data/reviews.txt`
- Fields: `review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date`
- Description: User reviews for books.
- Example rows:
  - `1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03`
  - `2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20`

### 6. fines.txt
- Path: `data/fines.txt`
- Fields: `fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued`
- Description: Overdue fine records.
- Example rows:
  - `1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30`

### Parsing Notes
- Dates are in `YYYY-MM-DD` format.
- Empty fields (e.g., `return_date`) represent null values.
- Pipe delimiter `|` is strictly enforced. No header rows.
- Numeric fields (IDs, amounts) use proper types as described.

datetime.datetime.strptime(due_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d').date()         if return_date_str:             return_date = datetime.datetime.strptime(return_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d').date()         else:             return_date = datetime.date.today()         if return_date > due_date:             return float((return_date - due_date).days) * 1.0         return 0.0     except Exception:         return 0.0  # calculate_fine(borrowing['due_date'], today_str)      if not update_borrowing(borrow_id, 'Returned', today_str, fine_amt):         return render_template('return_result.html', success=False, message='Failed to update borrowing.')      if not update_book_status(borrowing['book_id'], 'Available'):         return render_template('return_result.html', success=False, message='Failed to update book status.')      if fine_amt > 0.0:         add_fine(LOGGED_USERNAME, borrow_id, fine_amt)      msg = 'Book returned successfully.'     if fine_amt > 0:         msg += f' Late return fine: ${fine_amt:.2f}. Please pay the fine.'     return render_template('return_result.html', success=True, message=msg)   @app.route('/my_reservations') def my_reservations():     username = LOGGED_USERNAME in books if b['book_id'] == r['book_id']), 'Unknown')             user_reservations.append({                 'reservation_id': r['reservation_id'],                 'book_title': book_title,                 'reservation_date': r['reservation_date'],                 'status': r['status']             })     return render_template('my_reservations.html', username=username, reservations=user_reservations)   @app.route('/cancel_reservation/<int:reservation_id>', methods=['POST']) def cancel_reservation(reservation_id):     reservation = find_reservation(reservation_id)     if not reservation:         return render_template('cancel_reservation_result.html', success=False, message='Reservation not found.')     if reservation['username'] != LOGGED_USERNAME:         return render_template('cancel_reservation_result.html', success=False, message='Unauthorized action.')     if reservation['status'] != 'Active':         return render_template('cancel_reservation_result.html', success=False, message='Reservation is not active.')      if update_reservation_status(reservation_id, 'Cancelled'):         return render_template('cancel_reservation_result.html', success=True, message='Reservation cancelled successfully.')     else:         return render_template('cancel_reservation_result.html', success=False, for r in reviews:         if r['username'] == username:             book_title = next((b['title'] for b in books if b['book_id'] == r['book_id']), 'Unknown')             user_reviews.append({ r['review_date'],                 'book_id': r['book_id']             })     return render_template('my_reviews.html', username=username, reviews=user_reviews)   @app.route('/write_review/<int:book_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST']) def write_review(book_id):     book = find_book(book_id)     if not book:         flash('Book not found.')         return redirect(url_for('catalog_page'))      username = LOGGED_USERNAME     existing_review = None     for r in read_reviews():         if r['book_id'] == book_id and r['username'] == username:             existing_review = r             break      if request.method == 'POST':         rating = request.form.get('rating')         review_text = request.form.get('review_text', '').strip()          if rating is None or not rating.isdigit() or int(rating) < 1 or int(rating) > 5:             flash('Invalid rating. Must be 1-5.')             return redirect(url_for('write_review', book_id=book_id))          if not review_text:             flash('Review text cannot be empty.')             return redirect(url_for('write_review', book_id=book_id))          review_date = datetime.date.today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')         if existing_review:             if update_review(existing_review['review_id'], int(rating), review_text, review_date):                 flash('Review updated successfully.')             else:                 flash('Failed to update review.')             return redirect(url_for('my_reviews'))         else:             new_review = {                 'review_id': next_review_id(),                 'username': username,                 'book_id': book_id,                 'rating': int(rating),                 'review_text': review_text,                 'review_date': review_date             }             try: flash('Failed to add review.')             return redirect(url_for('my_reviews'))      book_simple = {'book_id': book['book_id'], 'title': book['title'], 'author': book['author']}     'review_text': existing_review['review_text']         }     return render_template('write_review.html', book=book_simple, existing_review=existing_review_simple) == username:             u['email'] = email             u['phone'] = phone             u['address'] = address             updated = True             break     if not updated:         return   [design_spec.md] # OnlineLibrary Design Specification  ---  ## Section 1: Flask Routes Specification (Backend Development)  ### General Notes - The root route `/` redirects to the dashboard page `/dashboard`. - Each route corresponds to a key user action: browsing, borrowing, returning, reviewing, reservation management. - HTTP methods use GET for page display and POST for state-changing operations.  | URL Path                            | Function Name          | HTTP Method(s) | Template Rendered           | Context Variables Passed to Template                                                  | |-----------------------------------|------------------------|----------------|-----------------------------|---------------------------------------------------------------------------------------| | `/`                               | `root_redirect`        | GET            | Redirect to `/dashboard`    | None                                                                                  | | `/dashboard`                     | `dashboard_page`       | GET            | `dashboard.html`             | `username` (str), `featured_books` (List[Dict{book_id: int, title: str}])             | | `/catalog`                       | `catalog_page`         | GET            | `catalog.html`               | `books` (List[Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str, status: str}])              | | `/book/<int:book_id>`            | `book_details`         | GET            | `book_details.html`          | `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str, status: str, description: str, avg_rating: float}), `reviews` (List[Dict{review_id: int, username: str, rating: int, review_text: str, review_date: str}]) | | `/borrow/<int:book_id>`          | `borrow_confirmation`  | GET, POST      | `borrow_confirmation.html`   | `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str}), `due_date` (str, YYYY-MM-DD)      | | `/borrow/<int:book_id>/confirm`  | `confirm_borrow`       | POST           | `borrow_result.html`         | `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    | | `/my_borrows`                   | `my_borrowings`        | GET            | `my_borrows.html`            | `username` (str), `borrows` (List[Dict{borrow_id: int, book_title: str, borrow_date: str, due_date: str, status: str}]) | | `/return_borrow/<int:borrow_id>` | `return_borrow`        | POST           | `return_result.html`         | `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    | | `/my_reservations`              | `my_reservations`      | GET            | `my_reservations.html`       | `username` (str), `reservations` (List[Dict{reservation_id: int, book_title: str, reservation_date: str, status: str}]) | | `/cancel_reservation/<int:reservation_id>` | `cancel_reservation` | POST     | `cancel_reservation_result.html`| `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    | | `/my_reviews`                  | `my_reviews`           | GET            | `my_reviews.html`            | `username` (str), `reviews` (List[Dict{review_id: int, book_title: str, rating: int, review_text: str, review_date: str}]) | | `/write_review/<int:book_id>`   | `write_review`         | GET, POST      | `write_review.html`          | `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str}), `existing_review` (Dict or None with fields review_id:int, rating:int, review_text:str) | | `/submit_review/<int:book_id>`  | `submit_review`        | POST           | `review_submit_result.html`  | `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    | | `/profile`                    | `user_profile`         | GET            | `profile.html`               | `username` (str), `email` (str), `phone` (str), `address` (str), `borrow_history` (List[Dict{book_title: str, borrow_date: str, return_date: str or None}]) | | `/update_profile`              | `update_profile`       | POST           | `profile_update_result.html` | `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    | | `/payment/<int:fine_id>`       | `payment_confirmation` | GET            | `payment_confirmation.html`  | `fine_amount` (float), `fine_id` (int)                                               | | `/confirm_payment/<int:fine_id>`| `confirm_payment`      | POST           | `payment_result.html`        | `success` (bool), `message` (str)                                                    |  ---  ## Section 2: HTML Template Specifications (Frontend Development)  ### 1. dashboard.html (templates/dashboard.html) - **Page Title (in <title> and <h1>):** "Library Dashboard" - **Elements:**   - `dashboard-page` (div)   - `welcome-message` (h1) - displays username welcome message   - `browse-books-button` (button) - navigates to Book Catalog   - `my-borrows-button` (button) - navigates to My Borrowings - **Context Variables:**   - `username` (str)   - `featured_books` (List[Dict{book_id: int, title: str}]) - **Navigation Mappings:**   - `browse-books-button`: `url_for('catalog_page')`   - `my-borrows-button`: `url_for('my_borrowings')`  ### 2. catalog.html (templates/catalog.html) - **Page Title:** "Book Catalog" - **Elements:**   - `catalog-page` (div)   - `search-input` (input) - search by title or author   - `book-grid` (div) - grid container for book cards   - `view-book-button-{book_id}` (button) - dynamic id for each book; navigates to Book Details   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - navigates back to Dashboard - **Context Variables:**   - `books` (List[Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str, status: str}]) - **Navigation Mappings:**   - `view-book-button-{book_id}`: `url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id)`   - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard_page')`  ### 3. book_details.html (templates/book_details.html) - **Page Title:** "Book Details" - **Elements:**   - `book-details-page` (div)   - `book-title` (h1)   - `book-author` (div)   - `book-status` (div) - shows availability: Available, Borrowed, Reserved   - `borrow-button` (button)   - `reviews-section` (div) - list user reviews   - `write-review-button` (button)   - `back-to-catalog` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str, status: str, description: str, avg_rating: float})   - `reviews` (List[Dict{review_id: int, username: str, rating: int, review_text: str, review_date: str}]) - **Navigation Mappings:**   - `borrow-button`: `url_for('borrow_confirmation', book_id=book.book_id)`   - `write-review-button`: `url_for('write_review', book_id=book.book_id)`   - `back-to-catalog`: `url_for('catalog_page')`  ### 4. borrow_confirmation.html (templates/borrow_confirmation.html) - **Page Title:** "Borrow Confirmation" - **Elements:**   - `borrow-page` (div)   - `borrow-book-info` (div)   - `due-date-display` (div)   - `confirm-borrow-button` (button, within a POST form)   - `cancel-borrow-button` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str})   - `due_date` (str, format YYYY-MM-DD) - **Navigation Mappings:**   - `confirm-borrow-button`: form action = `url_for('confirm_borrow', book_id=book.book_id)`, method="POST"   - `cancel-borrow-button`: `url_for('book_details', book_id=book.book_id)`  ### 5. my_borrows.html (templates/my_borrows.html) - **Page Title:** "My Borrowings" - **Elements:**   - `my-borrows-page` (div)   - `filter-status` (dropdown: All, Active, Returned, Overdue)   - `borrows-table` (table)   - `return-book-button-{borrow_id}` (button, dynamic id; each active borrow)   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `username` (str)   - `borrows` (List[Dict{borrow_id: int, book_title: str, borrow_date: str, due_date: str, status: str}]) - **Navigation Mappings:**   - `return-book-button-{borrow_id}`: form POST action = `url_for('return_borrow', borrow_id=borrow_id)`   - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard_page')`  ### 6. my_reservations.html (templates/my_reservations.html) - **Page Title:** "My Reservations" - **Elements:**   - `reservations-page` (div)   - `reservations-table` (table)   - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}` (button, dynamic id)   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `username` (str)   - `reservations` (List[Dict{reservation_id: int, book_title: str, reservation_date: str, status: str}]) - **Navigation Mappings:**   - `cancel-reservation-button-{reservation_id}`: form POST action = `url_for('cancel_reservation', reservation_id=reservation_id)`   - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard_page')`  ### 7. my_reviews.html (templates/my_reviews.html) - **Page Title:** "My Reviews" - **Elements:**   - `reviews-page` (div)   - `reviews-list` (div)   - `edit-review-button-{review_id}` (button, dynamic id)   - `delete-review-button-{review_id}` (button, dynamic id)   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `username` (str)   - `reviews` (List[Dict{review_id: int, book_title: str, rating: int, review_text: str, review_date: str}]) - **Navigation Mappings:**   - `edit-review-button-{review_id}`: `url_for('write_review', book_id=book_id)`  (book_id must be provided by backend with reviews data)   - `delete-review-button-{review_id}`: form POST action = `url_for('delete_review', review_id=review_id)`   - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard_page')`  ### 8. write_review.html (templates/write_review.html) - **Page Title:** "Write Review" - **Elements:**   - `write-review-page` (div)   - `book-info-display` (div)   - `rating-input` (dropdown with options 1-5)   - `review-text` (textarea)   - `submit-review-button` (button within POST form)   - `back-to-book` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `book` (Dict{book_id: int, title: str, author: str})   - `existing_review` (Dict or None with fields review_id, rating, review_text) - **Navigation Mappings:**   - `submit-review-button`: form POST action = `url_for('submit_review', book_id=book.book_id)`   - `back-to-book`: `url_for('book_details', book_id=book.book_id)`  ### 9. profile.html (templates/profile.html) - **Page Title:** "My Profile" - **Elements:**   - `profile-page` (div)   - `profile-username` (div)   - `profile-email` (input, type="email")   - `update-profile-button` (button within POST form)   - `borrow-history` (div)   - `back-to-dashboard` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `username` (str)   - `email` (str)   - `phone` (str)   - `address` (str)   - `borrow_history` (List[Dict{book_title: str, borrow_date: str, return_date: str or None}]) - **Navigation Mappings:**   - `update-profile-button`: form POST action = `url_for('update_profile')`   - `back-to-dashboard`: `url_for('dashboard_page')`  ### 10. payment_confirmation.html (templates/payment_confirmation.html) - **Page Title:** "Payment Confirmation" - **Elements:**   - `payment-page` (div)   - `fine-amount-display` (div)   - `confirm-payment-button` (button within POST form)   - `back-to-profile` (button) - **Context Variables:**   - `fine_amount` (float)   - `fine_id` (int) - **Navigation Mappings:**   - `confirm-payment-button`: form POST action = `url_for('confirm_payment', fine_id=fine_id)`   - `back-to-profile`: `url_for('user_profile')`  ---  ## Section 3: Data File Schemas (Backend Development)  All files located inside the `data` directory. Files are pipe (`|`) delimited without headers.  ### 1. users.txt - Path: `data/users.txt` - Fields: `username|email|phone|address` - Description: Stores user profile information. - Example rows:   - `john_reader|john@example.com|555-1234|123 Main St`   - `jane_doe|jane@example.com|555-5678|789 Oak St`  ### 2. books.txt - Path: `data/books.txt` - Fields: `book_id|title|author|isbn|genre|publisher|year|description|status|avg_rating` - Description: Stores details of all books. - Example rows:   - `1|To Kill a Mockingbird|Harper Lee|978-0-06-112008-4|Fiction|HarperCollins|1960|A gripping tale of racial injustice and childhood innocence.|Available|4.8`   - `2|Sapiens|Yuval Noah Harari|978-0-06-231609-7|Non-Fiction|Harper|2011|A brief history of humankind.|Borrowed|4.6`   - `3|1984|George Orwell|978-0-452-28423-4|Fiction|Signet Classic|1949|A dystopian social science fiction novel.|Available|4.7`  ### 3. borrowings.txt - Path: `data/borrowings.txt` - Fields: `borrow_id|username|book_id|borrow_date|due_date|return_date|status|fine_amount` - Description: User borrow transaction records. - Example rows:   - `1|john_reader|2|2024-11-01|2024-11-15||Active|0`   - `2|jane_doe|1|2024-10-20|2024-11-03|2024-11-02|Returned|0`   - `3|john_reader|3|2024-10-15|2024-10-29||Overdue|5.00`  ### 4. reservations.txt - Path: `data/reservations.txt` - Fields: `reservation_id|username|book_id|reservation_date|status` - Description: Records for user reservations. - Example rows:   - `1|jane_doe|4|2024-11-10|Active`   - `2|john_reader|2|2024-10-25|Cancelled`  ### 5. reviews.txt - Path: `data/reviews.txt` - Fields: `review_id|username|book_id|rating|review_text|review_date` - Description: User reviews for books. - Example rows:   - `1|jane_doe|1|5|An absolute masterpiece! A must-read.|2024-11-03`   - `2|john_reader|3|4|Thought-provoking and eerily relevant today.|2024-10-20`  ### 6. fines.txt - Path: `data/fines.txt` - Fields: `fine_id|username|borrow_id|amount|status|date_issued` - Description: Overdue fine records. - Example rows:   - `1|john_reader|3|5.00|Unpaid|2024-10-30`  ### Parsing Notes - Dates are in `YYYY-MM-DD` format. - Empty fields (e.g., `return_date`) represent null values. - Pipe delimiter `|` is strictly enforced. No header rows. - Numeric fields (IDs, amounts) use proper types as described.  ---  This completes the detailed design_spec.md for the OnlineLibrary application to enable parallel backend and frontend development aligning strictly with user requirements.

= []\n    try:\n        with open(books_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 10:\n                    continue\n                (book_id, title, author, isbn, genre, publisher, year, description, status, avg_rating) = parts\n                try:\n                    books.append({\n                        'book_id': int(book_id),\n                        'title': title,\n                        'author': author,\n                        'isbn': isbn,\n                        'genre': genre,\n                        'publisher': publisher,\n                        'year': int(year),\n                        'description': description,\n                        'status': status,\n                        'avg_rating': float(avg_rating)\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except Exception as e:\n        flash(f\"Error reading books data: {e}\")\n    return books\n\n\ndef write_books(books: List[Dict]) -> None:\n    try:\n        with open(books_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for b in books:\n                f.write(f\"{b['book_id']}|{b['title']}|{b['author']}|{b['isbn']}|{b['genre']}|{b['publisher']}|{b['year']}|{b['description']}|{b['status']}|{b['avg_rating']}\\n\")\n    except Exception as e:\n        flash(f\"Error writing books data: {e}\")\n\n\ndef read_borrowings() -> List[Dict]:\n    borrowings = []\n    try:\n        with open(borrowings_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 8:\n                    continue\n                borrow_id, username, book_id, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, status, fine_amount = parts\n                try:\n                    borrowings.append({\n                        'borrow_id': int(borrow_id),\n                        'username': username,\n                        'book_id': int(book_id),\n                        'borrow_date': borrow_date,\n                        'due_date': due_date,\n                        'return_date': return_date if return_date else None,\n                        'status': status,\n                        'fine_amount': float(fine_amount)\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except Exception as e:\n        flash(f\"Error reading borrowings data: {e}\")\n    return borrowings\n\n\ndef write_borrowings(borrowings: List[Dict]) -> None:\n    try:\n        with open(borrowings_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for b in borrowings:\n                return_date = b['return_date'] if b['return_date'] else ''\n                f.write(f\"{b['borrow_id']}|{b['username']}|{b['book_id']}|{b['borrow_date']}|{b['due_date']}|{return_date}|{b['status']}|{b['fine_amount']}\\n\")\n    except Exception as e:\n        flash(f\"Error writing borrowings data: {e}\")\n\n\ndef read_reservations() -> List[Dict]:\n    reservations = []\n    try:\n        with open(reservations_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for status = parts\n                try:\n                    reservations.append({\n                        'reservation_id': int(reservation_id),\n                        'username': username,\n                        'book_id': int(book_id),\n                        'reservation_date': reservation_date,\n                        'status': status\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except Exception as e:\n        flash(f\"Error reading reservations data: {e}\")\n    return reservations\n\n\ndef write_reservations(reservations: List[Dict]) -> None:\n    try:\n        with open(reservations_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for r in reservations:\n                f.write(f\"{r['reservation_id']}|{r['username']}|{r['book_id']}|{r['reservation_date']}|{r['status']}\\n\")\n    except Exception as e:\n        flash(f\"Error writing reservations data: {e}\")\n\n\ndef read_reviews() -> List[Dict]:\n    reviews = []\n    try:\n        with open(reviews_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 6:\n                    continue\n                review_id, username, book_id, rating, review_text, review_date = parts\n                try:\n                    reviews.append({\n                        'review_id': int(review_id),\n                        'username': username,\n                        'book_id': int(book_id),\n                        'rating': int(rating),\n                        'review_text': review_text,\n                        'review_date': review_date\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except Exception as e:\n        flash(f\"Error reading reviews data: {e}\")\n    return reviews\n\n\ndef write_reviews(reviews: List[Dict]) -> None:\n    try:\n        with open(reviews_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for r in reviews:\n                f.write(f\"{r['review_id']}|{r['username']}|{r['book_id']}|{r['rating']}|{r['review_text']}|{r['review_date']}\\n\")\n    except Exception as e:\n        flash(f\"Error writing reviews data: {e}\")\n\n\ndef read_fines() -> List[Dict]:\n    fines = []\n    try:\n        with open(fines_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for line in f:\n                parts = line.strip().split('|')\n                if len(parts) != 6:\n                    continue\n                fine_id, username, borrow_id, amount, status, date_issued = parts\n                try:\n                    fines.append({\n                        'fine_id': int(fine_id),\n                        'username': username,\n                        'borrow_id': int(borrow_id),\n                        'amount': float(amount),\n                        'status': status,\n                        'date_issued': date_issued\n                    })\n                except ValueError:\n                    continue\n    except Exception as e:\n        flash(f\"Error reading fines data: {e}\")\n    return fines\n\n\ndef write_fines(fines: List[Dict]) -> None:\n    try:\n        with open(fines_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:\n            for fn in fines:\n                f.write(f\"{fn['fine_id']}|{fn['username']}|{fn['borrow_id']}|{fn['amount']}|{fn['status']}|{fn['date_issued']}\\n\")\n    except Exception as e:\n        flash(f\"Error writing fines data: {e}\")\n\n# Lookup helpers\n\ndef find_user(username: str) -> Optional[Dict]:\n    for u in read_users():\n        if u['username'] == username:\n            return u\n    return None\n\n\ndef find_book(book_id: int) -> Optional[Dict]:\n    for b in read_books():\n        if b['book_id'] == book_id:\n            return b\n    return None\n\n\ndef find_borrowing(borrow_id: int) -> Optional[Dict]:\n    for b in read_borrowings():\n        if b['borrow_id'] == borrow_id:\n            return b\n    return None\n\n\ndef find_reservation(reservation_id: int) -> Optional[Dict]:\n    for r in read_reservations():\n        if r['reservation_id'] == reservation_id:\n            return r\n    return None\n\n\ndef find_review(review_id: int) -> Optional[Dict]:\n    for r in read_reviews():\n        if r['review_id'] == review_id:\n            return r\n    return None\n\n\ndef find_fine(fine_id: int) -> Optional[Dict]:\n    for f in read_fines():\n        if f['fine_id'] == fine_id:\n            return f\n    return None\n\n# Helper functions to generate unique IDs\n\ndef next_borrow_id() -> int:\n    borrowings = read_borrowings()\n    if not borrowings:\n        return 1\n    return max(b['borrow_id'] for b in borrowings) + 1\n\n\ndef next_reservation_id() -> int:\n    reservations = read_reservations()\n    if not reservations:\n        return 1\n    return max(r['reservation_id'] for r in reservations) + 1\n\n\ndef next_review_id() -> int:\n    reviews = read_reviews()\n    if not reviews:\n        return 1\n    return max(r['review_id'] for r in reviews) + 1\n\n\ndef next_fine_id() -> int:\n    fines = read_fines()\n    if not fines:\n        return 1\n    return max(f['fine_id'] for f in fines) + 1\n\n# Business Logic\n\ndef calculate_due_date(from_date: datetime.date) -> datetime.date:\n    return from_date + datetime.timedelta(days=14)\n\n\ndef update_book_status(book_id: int, new_status: str) -> bool:\n    books = read_books()\n    updated = False\n    for b in books:\n        if b['book_id'] == book_id:\n            b['status'] = new_status\n            updated = True\n            break\n    if updated:\n        write_books(books)\n    return updated\n\n\ndef update_borrowing(borrow_id: int, new_status: str, return_date: Optional[str] = None, fine_amount: Optional[float] = None) -> bool:\n    borrowings = read_borrowings()\n    updated = False\n    for b in borrowings:\n        if b['borrow_id'] == borrow_id:\n            b['status'] = new_status\n            if return_date is not None:\n write_borrowings(borrowings)\n    return updated\n\n\ndef update_reservation_status(reservation_id: int, new_status: str) -> bool:\n    reservations = read_reservations()\n    updated = False\n    for write_reservations(reservations)\n    return updated\n\n\ndef update_review(review_id: int, rating: int, review_text: str, review_date: str) -> bool:\n    reviews = read_reviews()\n    updated =     updated = True\n            break\n    if updated:\n        write_reviews(reviews)\n    return updated\n\n\ndef delete_review(review_id: int) -> bool:\n    reviews = read_reviews()\n False\n\n\ndef add_fine(username: str, borrow_id: int, amount: float) -> None:\n    fines = read_fines()\n    fine_id = next_fine_id()\n    today = datetime.date.today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')\n    fines.append({\n        'fine_id': fine_id,\n        'username': username,\n        'borrow_id': borrow_id,\n        'amount': amount,\n        'status': 'Unpaid',\n        'date_issued': today\n    })\n    write_fines(fines)\n\n\ndef calculate_fine(due_date_str: str, return_date_str: Optional[str]) -> float:\n    try:\n        due_date = datetime.datetime.strptime(due_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d').date()\n        if return_date_str:\n            return_date = datetime.datetime.strptime(return_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d').date()\n        else:\n            return_date = datetime.date.today()\n        if return_date > due_date:\n            return float((return_date - due_date).days) * 1.0\n        return 0.0\n    except Exception:\n        return 0.0\n\n# Logged user === app.py ===
from flask import Flask, render_template, redirect, url_for, request, flash
import os
import datetime
from typing import List, Dict, Optional

app = Flask(__name__)
app.secret_key = 'replace_with_a_secure_key'

DATA_DIR = 'data'

# File paths

def users_filepath():
    return os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'users.txt')

def books_filepath():
    return os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'books.txt')

def borrowings_filepath():
    return os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'borrowings.txt')

def reservations_filepath():
    return os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'reservations.txt')

def reviews_filepath():
    return os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'reviews.txt')

def fines_filepath():
    return os.path.join(DATA_DIR, 'fines.txt')

# Data loading functions

def read_users() -> List[Dict]:
    users = []
    try:
        with open(users_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 4:
                    continue
                username, email, phone, address = parts
                users.append({'username': username, 'email': email, 'phone': phone, 'address': address})
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error reading users data: {e}")
    return users


def write_users(users: List[Dict]) -> None:
    try:
        with open(users_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for u in users:
                f.write(f"{u['username']}|{u['email']}|{u['phone']}|{u['address']}\n")
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error writing users data: {e}")


def read_books() -> List[Dict]:
    books = []
    try:
        with open(books_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 10:
                    continue
                (book_id, title, author, isbn, genre, publisher, year, description, status, avg_rating) = parts
                try:
                    books.append({
                        'book_id': int(book_id),
                        'title': title,
                        'author': author,
                        'isbn': isbn,
                        'genre': genre,
                        'publisher': publisher,
                        'year': int(year),
                        'description': description,
                        'status': status,
                        'avg_rating': float(avg_rating)
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error reading books data: {e}")
    return books


def write_books(books: List[Dict]) -> None:
    try:
        with open(books_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for b in books:
                f.write(f"{b['book_id']}|{b['title']}|{b['author']}|{b['isbn']}|{b['genre']}|{b['publisher']}|{b['year']}|{b['description']}|{b['status']}|{b['avg_rating']}\n")
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error writing books data: {e}")


def read_borrowings() -> List[Dict]:
    borrowings = []
    try:
        with open(borrowings_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 8:
                    continue
                borrow_id, username, book_id, borrow_date, due_date, return_date, status, fine_amount = parts
                try:
                    borrowings.append({
                        'borrow_id': int(borrow_id),
                        'username': username,
                        'book_id': int(book_id),
                        'borrow_date': borrow_date,
                        'due_date': due_date,
                        'return_date': return_date if return_date else None,
                        'status': status,
                        'fine_amount': float(fine_amount)
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error reading borrowings data: {e}")
    return borrowings


def write_borrowings(borrowings: List[Dict]) -> None:
    try:
        with open(borrowings_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for b in borrowings:
                return_date = b['return_date'] if b['return_date'] else ''
                f.write(f"{b['borrow_id']}|{b['username']}|{b['book_id']}|{b['borrow_date']}|{b['due_date']}|{return_date}|{b['status']}|{b['fine_amount']}\n")
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error writing borrowings data: {e}")


def read_reservations() -> List[Dict]:
    reservations = []
    try:
        with open(reservations_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 5:
                    continue
                reservation_id, username, book_id, reservation_date, status = parts
                try:
                    reservations.append({
                        'reservation_id': int(reservation_id),
                        'username': username,
                        'book_id': int(book_id),
                        'reservation_date': reservation_date,
                        'status': status
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error reading reservations data: {e}")
    return reservations


def write_reservations(reservations: List[Dict]) -> None:
    try:
        with open(reservations_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for r in reservations:
                f.write(f"{r['reservation_id']}|{r['username']}|{r['book_id']}|{r['reservation_date']}|{r['status']}\n")
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error writing reservations data: {e}")


def read_reviews() -> List[Dict]:
    reviews = []
    try:
        with open(reviews_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 6:
                    continue
                review_id, username, book_id, rating, review_text, review_date = parts
                try:
                    reviews.append({
                        'review_id': int(review_id),
                        'username': username,
                        'book_id': int(book_id),
                        'rating': int(rating),
                        'review_text': review_text,
                        'review_date': review_date
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error reading reviews data: {e}")
    return reviews


def write_reviews(reviews: List[Dict]) -> None:
    try:
        with open(reviews_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for r in reviews:
                f.write(f"{r['review_id']}|{r['username']}|{r['book_id']}|{r['rating']}|{r['review_text']}|{r['review_date']}\n")
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error writing reviews data: {e}")


def read_fines() -> List[Dict]:
    fines = []
    try:
        with open(fines_filepath(), 'r', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for line in f:
                parts = line.strip().split('|')
                if len(parts) != 6:
                    continue
                fine_id, username, borrow_id, amount, status, date_issued = parts
                try:
                    fines.append({
                        'fine_id': int(fine_id),
                        'username': username,
                        'borrow_id': int(borrow_id),
                        'amount': float(amount),
                        'status': status,
                        'date_issued': date_issued
                    })
                except ValueError:
                    continue
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error reading fines data: {e}")
    return fines


def write_fines(fines: List[Dict]) -> None:
    try:
        with open(fines_filepath(), 'w', encoding='utf-8') as f:
            for fn in fines:
                f.write(f"{fn['fine_id']}|{fn['username']}|{fn['borrow_id']}|{fn['amount']}|{fn['status']}|{fn['date_issued']}\n")
    except Exception as e:
        flash(f"Error writing fines data: {e}")

# Lookup helpers

def find_user(username: str) -> Optional[Dict]:
    for u in read_users():
        if u['username'] == username:
            return u
    return None


def find_book(book_id: int) -> Optional[Dict]:
    for b in read_books():
        if b['book_id'] == book_id:
            return b
    return None


def find_borrowing(borrow_id: int) -> Optional[Dict]:
    for b in read_borrowings():
        if b['borrow_id'] == borrow_id:
            return b
    return None


def find_reservation(reservation_id: int) -> Optional[Dict]:
    for r in read_reservations():
        if r['reservation_id'] == reservation_id:
            return r
    return None


def find_review(review_id: int) -> Optional[Dict]:
    for r in read_reviews():
        if r['review_id'] == review_id:
            return r
    return None


def find_fine(fine_id: int) -> Optional[Dict]:
    for f in read_fines():
        if f['fine_id'] == fine_id:
            return f
    return None

# Helper functions to generate unique IDs

def next_borrow_id() -> int:
    borrowings = read_borrowings()
    if not borrowings:
        return 1
    return max(b['borrow_id'] for b in borrowings) + 1


def next_reservation_id() -> int:
    reservations = read_reservations()
    if not reservations:
        return 1
    return max(r['reservation_id'] for r in reservations) + 1


def next_review_id() -> int:
    reviews = read_reviews()
    if not reviews:
        return 1
    return max(r['review_id'] for r in reviews) + 1


def next_fine_id() -> int:
    fines = read_fines()
    if not fines:
        return 1
    return max(f['fine_id'] for f in fines) + 1

# Business Logic

def calculate_due_date(from_date: datetime.date) -> datetime.date:
    return from_date + datetime.timedelta(days=14)


def update_book_status(book_id: int, new_status: str) -> bool:
    books = read_books()
    updated = False
    for b in books:
        if b['book_id'] == book_id:
            b['status'] = new_status
            updated = True
            break
    if updated:
        write_books(books)
    return updated


def update_borrowing(borrow_id: int, new_status: str, return_date: Optional[str] = None, fine_amount: Optional[float] = None) -> bool:
    borrowings = read_borrowings()
    updated = False
    for b in borrowings:
        if b['borrow_id'] == borrow_id:
            b['status'] = new_status
            if return_date is not None:
                b['return_date'] = return_date
            if fine_amount is not None:
                b['fine_amount'] = fine_amount
            updated = True
            break
    if updated:
        write_borrowings(borrowings)
    return updated


def update_reservation_status(reservation_id: int, new_status: str) -> bool:
    reservations = read_reservations()
    updated = False
    for r in reservations:
        if r['reservation_id'] == reservation_id:
            r['status'] = new_status
            updated = True
            break
    if updated:
        write_reservations(reservations)
    return updated


def update_review(review_id: int, rating: int, review_text: str, review_date: str) -> bool:
    reviews = read_reviews()
    updated = False
    for r in reviews:
        if r['review_id'] == review_id:
            r['rating'] = rating
            r['review_text'] = review_text
            r['review_date'] = review_date
            updated = True
            break
    if updated:
        write_reviews(reviews)
    return updated


def delete_review(review_id: int) -> bool:
    reviews = read_reviews()
    initial_len = len(reviews)
    reviews = [r for r in reviews if r['review_id'] != review_id]
    if len(reviews) < initial_len:
        write_reviews(reviews)
        return True
    return False


def add_fine(username: str, borrow_id: int, amount: float) -> None:
    fines = read_fines()
    fine_id = next_fine_id()
    today = datetime.date.today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
    fines.append({
        'fine_id': fine_id,
        'username': username,
        'borrow_id': borrow_id,
        'amount': amount,
        'status': 'Unpaid',
        'date_issued': today
    })
    write_fines(fines)


def calculate_fine(due_date_str: str, return_date_str: Optional[str]) -> float:
    try:
        due_date = datetime.datetime.strptime(due_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d').date()
        if return_date_str:
            return_date = datetime.datetime.strptime(return_date_str, '%Y-%m-%d').date()
        else:
            return_date = datetime.date.today()
        if return_date > due_date:
            return float((return_date - due_date).days) * 1.0
        return 0.0
    except Exception:
        return 0.0

# Logged user simulation
LOGGED_USERNAME = 'john_reader'


@app.route('/')
def root_redirect():
    return redirect(url_for('dashboard_page'))


@app.route('/dashboard')
def dashboard_page():
    username = LOGGED_USERNAME
    books = read_books()
    featured = sorted([b for b in books if b['status'] == 'Available'], key=lambda x: x['avg_rating'], reverse=True)[:3]
    featured_books = [{'book_id': b['book_id'], 'title': b['title']} for b in featured]
    return render_template('dashboard.html', username=username, featured_books=featured_books)


@app.route('/catalog')
def catalog_page():
    books = read_books()
    books_list = [{'book_id': b['book_id'], 'title': b['title'], 'author': b['author'], 'status': b['status']} for b in books]
    return render_template('catalog.html', books=books_list)


@app.route('/book/<int:book_id>')
def book_details(book_id):
    book = find_book(book_id)
    if not book:
        flash('Book not found.')
        return redirect(url_for('catalog_page'))

    reviews = [r for r in read_reviews() if r['book_id'] == book_id]
    reviews_sorted = sorted(reviews, key=lambda r: r['review_date'], reverse=True)
    reviews_for_template = [{
        'review_id': r['review_id'],
        'username': r['username'],
        'rating': r['rating'],
        'review_text': r['review_text'],
        'review_date': r['review_date']
    } for r in reviews_sorted]

    book_for_template = {
        'book_id': book['book_id'],
        'title': book['title'],
        'author': book['author'],
        'status': book['status'],
        'description': book['description'],
        'avg_rating': book['avg_rating']
    }
    return render_template('book_details.html', book=book_for_template, reviews=reviews_for_template)


@app.route('/borrow/<int:book_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def borrow_confirmation(book_id):
    book = find_book(book_id)
    if not book:
        flash('Book not found.')
        return redirect(url_for('catalog_page'))

    if request.method == 'POST':
        if book['status'] != 'Available':
            flash('This book is currently not available for borrowing.')
            return redirect(url_for('book_details', book_id=book_id))
        return redirect(url_for('confirm_borrow', book_id=book_id))

    due_date = calculate_due_date(datetime.date.today()).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
    book_simple = {'book_id': book['book_id'], 'title': book['title'], 'author': book['author']}
    return render_template('borrow_confirmation.html', book=book_simple, due_date=due_date)


@app.route('/borrow/<int:book_id>/confirm', methods=['POST'])
def confirm_borrow(book_id):
    book = find_book(book_id)
    if not book:
        return render_template('borrow_result.html', success=False, message='Book not found.')
    if book['status'] != 'Available':
        return render_template('borrow_result.html', success=False, message='Book is not available for borrowing.')

    username = LOGGED_USERNAME
    today_str = datetime.date.today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
    due_date_str = calculate_due_date(datetime.date.today()).strftime('%Y-%m-%d')

    borrow_id = next_borrow_id()
    borrowings = read_borrowings()
    borrowings.append({
        'borrow_id': borrow_id,
        'username': username,
        'book_id': book_id,
        'borrow_date': today_str,
        'due_date': due_date_str,
        'return_date': None,
        'status': 'Active',
        'fine_amount': 0.0
    })
    try:
        write_borrowings(borrowings)
    except Exception as e:
        return render_template('borrow_result.html', success=False, message='Failed to save borrowing record.')

    if not update_book_status(book_id, 'Borrowed'):
        return render_template('borrow_result.html', success=False, message='Failed to update book status.')

    return render_template('borrow_result.html', success=True, message=f'Borrowing confirmed for "{book["title"]}". Due date: {due_date_str}.')


@app.route('/my_borrows')
def my_borrowings():
    username = LOGGED_USERNAME
    borrowings = read_borrowings()
    books = read_books()

    status_filter = request.args.get('status', 'All')
    filtered = []
    for b in borrowings:
        if b['username'] != username:
            continue
        if status_filter != 'All' and b['status'] != status_filter:
            continue
        book_title = next((book['title'] for book in books if book['book_id'] == b['book_id']), 'Unknown')
        filtered.append({
            'borrow_id': b['borrow_id'],
            'book_title': book_title,
            'borrow_date': b['borrow_date'],
            'due_date': b['due_date'],
            'status': b['status']
        })

    return render_template('my_borrows.html', username=username, borrows=filtered)


@app.route('/return_borrow/<int:borrow_id>', methods=['POST'])
def return_borrow(borrow_id):
    borrowing = find_borrowing(borrow_id)
    if not borrowing:
        return render_template('return_result.html', success=False, message='Borrowing record not found.')
    if borrowing['username'] != LOGGED_USERNAME:
        return render_template('return_result.html', success=False, message='Unauthorized action.')
    if borrowing['status'] not in ('Active', 'Overdue'):
        return render_template('return_result.html', success=False, message='This borrowing is no longer active.')

    today_str = datetime.date.today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
    fine_amt = calculate_fine(borrowing['due_date'], today_str)

    if not update_borrowing(borrow_id, 'Returned', today_str, fine_amt):
        return render_template('return_result.html', success=False, message='Failed to update borrowing.')

    if not update_book_status(borrowing['book_id'], 'Available'):
        return render_template('return_result.html', success=False, message='Failed to update book status.')

    if fine_amt > 0.0:
        add_fine(LOGGED_USERNAME, borrow_id, fine_amt)

    msg = 'Book returned successfully.'
    if fine_amt > 0:
        msg += f' Late return fine: ${fine_amt:.2f}. Please pay the fine.'
    return render_template('return_result.html', success=True, message=msg)


@app.route('/my_reservations')
def my_reservations():
    username = LOGGED_USERNAME
    reservations = read_reservations()
    books = read_books()

    user_reservations = []
    for r in reservations:
        if r['username'] == username:
            book_title = next((b['title'] for b in books if b['book_id'] == r['book_id']), 'Unknown')
            user_reservations.append({
                'reservation_id': r['reservation_id'],
                'book_title': book_title,
                'reservation_date': r['reservation_date'],
                'status': r['status']
            })
    return render_template('my_reservations.html', username=username, reservations=user_reservations)


@app.route('/cancel_reservation/<int:reservation_id>', methods=['POST'])
def cancel_reservation(reservation_id):
    reservation = find_reservation(reservation_id)
    if not reservation:
        return render_template('cancel_reservation_result.html', success=False, message='Reservation not found.')
    if reservation['username'] != LOGGED_USERNAME:
        return render_template('cancel_reservation_result.html', success=False, message='Unauthorized action.')
    if reservation['status'] != 'Active':
        return render_template('cancel_reservation_result.html', success=False, message='Reservation is not active.')

    if update_reservation_status(reservation_id, 'Cancelled'):
        return render_template('cancel_reservation_result.html', success=True, message='Reservation cancelled successfully.')
    else:
        return render_template('cancel_reservation_result.html', success=False, message='Failed to cancel reservation.')


@app.route('/my_reviews')
def my_reviews():
    username = LOGGED_USERNAME
    reviews = read_reviews()
    books = read_books()

    user_reviews = []
    for r in reviews:
        if r['username'] == username:
            book_title = next((b['title'] for b in books if b['book_id'] == r['book_id']), 'Unknown')
            user_reviews.append({
                'review_id': r['review_id'],
                'book_title': book_title,
                'rating': r['rating'],
                'review_text': r['review_text'],
                'review_date': r['review_date'],
                'book_id': r['book_id']
            })
    return render_template('my_reviews.html', username=username, reviews=user_reviews)


@app.route('/write_review/<int:book_id>', methods=['GET', 'POST'])
def write_review(book_id):
    book = find_book(book_id)
    if not book:
        flash('Book not found.')
        return redirect(url_for('catalog_page'))

    username = LOGGED_USERNAME
    existing_review = None
    for r in read_reviews():
        if r['book_id'] == book_id and r['username'] == username:
            existing_review = r
            break

    if request.method == 'POST':
        rating = request.form.get('rating')
        review_text = request.form.get('review_text', '').strip()

        if rating is None or not rating.isdigit() or int(rating) < 1 or int(rating) > 5:
            flash('Invalid rating. Must be 1-5.')
            return redirect(url_for('write_review', book_id=book_id))

        if not review_text:
            flash('Review text cannot be empty.')
            return redirect(url_for('write_review', book_id=book_id))

        review_date = datetime.date.today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')
        if existing_review:
            if update_review(existing_review['review_id'], int(rating), review_text, review_date):
                flash('Review updated successfully.')
            else:
                flash('Failed to update review.')
            return redirect(url_for('my_reviews'))
        else:
            new_review = {
                'review_id': next_review_id(),
                'username': username,
                'book_id': book_id,
                'rating': int(rating),
                'review_text': review_text,
                'review_date': review_date
            }
            try:
                reviews = read_reviews()
                reviews.append(new_review)
                write_reviews(reviews)
                flash('Review added successfully.')
            except:
                flash('Failed to add review.')
            return redirect(url_for('my_reviews'))

    book_simple = {'book_id': book['book_id'], 'title': book['title'], 'author': book['author']}
    existing_review_simple = None
    if existing_review:
        existing_review_simple = {
            'review_id': existing_review['review_id'],
            'rating': existing_review['rating'],
            'review_text': existing_review['review_text']
        }
    return render_template('write_review.html', book=book_simple, existing_review=existing_review_simple)


@app.route('/submit_review/<int:book_id>', methods=['POST'])
def submit_review(book_id):
    book = find_book(book_id)
    if not book:
        return render_template('review_submit_result.html', success=False, message='Book not found.')

    rating = request.form.get('rating')
    review_text = request.form.get('review_text', '').strip()

    if rating is None or not rating.isdigit() or int(rating) < 1 or int(rating) > 5:
        return render_template('review_submit_result.html', success=False, message='Invalid rating. Must be 1-5.')
    if not review_text:
        return render_template('review_submit_result.html', success=False, message='Review text cannot be empty.')

    username = LOGGED_USERNAME
    reviews = read_reviews()
    existing_review = None
    for r in reviews:
        if r['book_id'] == book_id and r['username'] == username:
            existing_review = r
            break

    review_date = datetime.date.today().strftime('%Y-%m-%d')

    if existing_review:
        if update_review(existing_review['review_id'], int(rating), review_text, review_date):
            return render_template('review_submit_result.html', success=True, message='Review updated successfully.')
        else:
            return render_template('review_submit_result.html', success=False, message='Failed to update review.')
    else:
        new_review = {
            'review_id': next_review_id(),
            'username': username,
            'book_id': book_id,
            'rating': int(rating),
            'review_text': review_text,
            'review_date': review_date
        }
        try:
            reviews.append(new_review)
            write_reviews(reviews)
            return render_template('review_submit_result.html', success=True, message='Review added successfully.')
        except:
            return render_template('review_submit_result.html', success=False, message='Failed to add review.')


@app.route('/profile')
def user_profile():
    username = LOGGED_USERNAME
    user = find_user(username)
    if not user:
        flash('User profile not found.')
        return redirect(url_for('dashboard_page'))

    email = user['email']
    phone = user['phone']
    address = user['address']

    borrowings = read_borrowings()
    books = read_books()
    borrow_history = []
    for b in borrowings:
        if b['username'] == username:
            book_title = next((bk['title'] for bk in books if bk['book_id'] == b['book_id']), 'Unknown')
            borrow_history.append({
                'book_title': book_title,
                'borrow_date': b['borrow_date'],
                'return_date': b['return_date']
            })
    return render_template('profile.html', username=username, email=email, phone=phone, address=address, borrow_history=borrow_history)


@app.route('/update_profile', methods=['POST'])
def update_profile():
    username = LOGGED_USERNAME
    email = request.form.get('email', '').strip()
    phone = request.form.get('phone', '').strip()
    address = request.form.get('address', '').strip()

    if not email:
        return render_template('profile_update_result.html', success=False, message='Email cannot be empty.')

    users = read_users()
    updated = False
    for u in users:
        if u['username'] == username:
            u['email'] = email
            u['phone'] = phone
            u['address'] = address
            updated = True
            break
    if not updated:
        return render_template('profile_update_result.html', success=False, message='User not found.')

    try:
        write_users(users)
        return render_template('profile_update_result.html', success=True, message='Profile updated successfully.')
    except Exception as e:
        return render_template('profile_update_result.html', success=False, message='Failed to update profile.')


@app.route('/payment/<int:fine_id>')
def payment_confirmation(fine_id):
    fine = find_fine(fine_id)
    if not fine:
        flash('Fine record not found.')
        return redirect(url_for('user_profile'))
    return render_template('payment_confirmation.html', fine_amount=fine['amount'], fine_id=fine_id)


@app.route('/confirm_payment/<int:fine_id>', methods=['POST'])
def confirm_payment(fine_id):
    fine = find_fine(fine_id)
    if not fine:
        return render_template('payment_result.html', success=False, message='Fine record not found.')
    if fine['status'] == 'Paid':
        return render_template('payment_result.html', success=False, message='Fine has already been paid.')

    if mark_fine_paid(fine_id):
        return render_template('payment_result.html', success=True, message='Payment successful. Thank you.')
    else:
        return render_template('payment_result.html', success=False, message='Payment failed.')


if __name__ == '__main__':
    app.run(debug=True)
